title: orobanche major subsp. krylowii
intro: Orobanche major subsp. krylowii, also known as Krylov's broomrape, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the broomrape family (Orobanchaceae). It is a medicinal plant with properties that include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant is used in herbal preparations to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, Orobanche major subsp. krylowii is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
